protocols.Paper_title: Micropatterned Viral Membrane Clusters for Antiviral Drug Evaluation
protocols.Evidence: “Small unilamellar liposomes were prepared by an extrusion method” and later used for fluorescence-based cluster measurements.

protocols.Paper_title: Micropatterned Viral Membrane Clusters for Antiviral Drug Evaluation
protocols.Evidence: “PDMS Stamp Fabrication” describes fabrication of patterned stamps for later microcontact printing.

protocols.Paper_title: Micropatterned Viral Membrane Clusters for Antiviral Drug Evaluation
protocols.Evidence: “Microcontact Printing” describes cleaned coverslips and PDMS stamps, followed by patterned neutravidin transfer.

protocols.Paper_title: Micropatterned Viral Membrane Clusters for Antiviral Drug Evaluation
protocols.Evidence: The study tracked “membrane lysis by the AH peptide” by monitoring fluorescence signals from patterned liposome clusters.
